title: Tender Greek Fish Fry
description: A delicious, high-protein Greek dish made with tender fish, crispy all-purpose flour, and a hint of freshness.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, Greek seasoning, and a pinch of salt.
Dip each cod fillet into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Dip the coated fillet into the beaten egg, ensuring it's fully coated.
Place the coated fillet onto the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the fillets in a single layer.
Bake the fish for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, chop the fresh parsley and set aside for garnish.
Once the fish is cooked, remove it from the oven.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges on the side.
